entries.definition:
dh–ʾ–b wolf, wolf-like, ruffians; nobility; to act in a devious way; forelock; summit. Of this root, only ذِئْب dhiʾb occurs three times in the Qur’an.
ذِئْب dhiʾb [n.] wolf (12:17) فَأَكَلَهُ الذِّئْبُ and a wolf ate him.

ذِئْب dhiʾb [n.] wolf (12:17) فَأَكَلَهُ الذِّئْبُ and a wolf ate him.
